svg.text: © 2026 Steve Griffing PE(CSE) CISSP-ISSEP CPP · CC BY 4.0
SENSOR PLACEMENT — TOP VIEW (18" hull, not to scale)
5mm PMMA disc → 0.5mm, UV-cured · sensor seats on 0.3mm PETG shoulder · M1.6×4 screws ×2
S5 Zenith + S6 Nadir not shown (vertical plane — 4m range each)
ch0 ch1 ch2 ch3 ch4 ch5
All sensors: 2.8V (on-board LDO) or 3.3V via SENSORHAT I/O rail
XSHUT: active-LOW shutdown. Pulled HIGH via 10k on MCP23008 output.
Cut 6× PMMA discs (5mm dia, 0.5mm) from clear acrylic sheet.
Mark sensor positions on hull: S1@25mm, S2@440mm, S3/S4@200mm,
Drill 6.5mm hole at each position. Deburr from inside.
Press-fit sensor mount into hole. Secure with 2× M1.6×4 screws.
Solder VL53L5CX onto breakout PCB. Attach 4-wire JST-SH1.0 cable.
Seat sensor PCB in mount shoulder. Apply UV adhesive to PMMA disc,
place over aperture, cure 60s with UV torch.
Route cables through foam conduits / hull ribs to Panel D bay.
Assemble TCA9548A + MCP23008 on shared PCB. Connect to Node 3 I²C.
Connect 6 sensor SDA/SCL to TCA9548A ch 0–5. XSHUT to MCP23008 GP0–5.
Flash Node 3 with vl53l5cx_mux firmware. Boot assigns addresses
0x54–0x59 via XSHUT sequence. Verify 6× "OK" in sensor_check log.
Indoor hover test: approach wall at 0.5m/s — verify FC holds 0.4m distance
on all axes. Check nadir reading during takeoff (<0.5m AGL = hold).
⚠ DO NOT obstruct apertures with paint, foam, or tape.
Keep PMMA disc optically clear. VL53L5CX VCSEL is class 1 eye-safe.
Sensor: ST VL53L5CX multizone Time-of-Flight (SPAD array)
Range: 0.4 – 4.0 m indoor · 65° diagonal FoV · 8×8 zones = 64 distance points/frame
Rate: 15 Hz full-resolution · I²C at 1 MHz · Package 6.4×3.0×1.5 mm · 2.8 V VDD · Class 1 VCSEL
